zh.Markeaton, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾馬可亞頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell於大約1244年出生在英國爾布格拉福頓時，他的父親Robert Touchet27歲，母親Eva d’Apleby23歲。他與Margaret結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1314年5月1日在英國德比夏爾馬可亞頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.Markeaton, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾馬可亞頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell于大约1244年出生在英国爾布格拉福頓时，他的父亲Robert Touchet27岁，母亲Eva d’Apleby23岁。他与Margaret结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1314年5月1日在英国德比夏爾馬可亞頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell was born about 1244, in Buglawton, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert Touchet, was 27 and his mother, Eva d’Apleby, was 23. He married Margaret. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 1 May 1314, in Markeaton, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell est né environ 1244, à Buglawton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Touchet, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eva d’Apleby, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1314, à Markeaton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell um 1244 in Buglawton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Touchet 27 und seine Mutter Eva d’Apleby 23. Er hat Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 1. Mai 1314 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Markeaton, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell è nato il circa 1244 nel Buglawton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Touchet, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Eva d’Apleby, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 1 maggio 1314, nel Markeaton, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell(이)가 대략 1244년 영국 체실르 버글로턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Touchet(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva d’Apleby(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1314년 5월 1일 영국 더비실르 마크이턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell nasceu aproximadamente 1244, em Buglawton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Touchet, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eva d’Apleby, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1314, em Markeaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell родился около 1244 г. в местности буглавтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Touchet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva d’Apleby, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 1 мая 1314 г. в местности маркитон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell nació aproximadamente 1244, en Buglawton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Touchet, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eva d’Apleby, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1314, en Markeaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
